alarm.bigmoney_desc: Catches unusually large money entries placed in a single move or short window.
alarm.bigmoney_why: Why it matters: Big money inflows often pressure the market.
alarm.drop_desc: Detects sharp odds drops in a short time (Dropping Odds).
alarm.drop_why: Why it matters: A drop shows the market is repricing expectations.
alarm.leader_desc: Catches the moment the side taking most of the money flips (market leader flip).
alarm.leader_why: Why it matters: When money changes direction, perception or info has shifted.
alarm.mim_desc: A composite signal based on Market Impact / Momentum that summarizes the "impact strength" of a move.
alarm.mim_why: Why it matters: Instead of one metric, you see the size of the impact on a single screen.
alarm.section_sub: When the market moves, the system warns you. 6 different alert types, each capturing a different signal.
alarm.sharp_desc: The signal that the side seen as "smart money" has started moving in the market.
alarm.sharp_why: Why it matters: Sharp moves usually drive the price.
alarm.volume_desc: Triggered when money flow suddenly multiplies versus normal volume.
alarm.volume_why: Why it matters: A sudden volume spike signals unusual interest or information flow.

j.rv_approved_desc: Past signals approved by the editor with recorded outcomes. Track accuracy via the track record.
j.rv_confirmed_desc: Detects matches with money flow ≥80%, odds monotonically dropping in 16h (≥4%), and volume ≥£2,000.
j.rv_confirmed_v2_desc: Money flow ≥88%, odds 1.55-2.20, ≥7% drop — zero losses in 3-day research. Only 1/2 selections.
j.rv_early_desc: Detects matches with money flow locked early and remaining stable across consecutive snapshots.
j.rv_fake_desc: Detects matches where odds rise despite money inflow — i.e. public money mistaken for sharp action.
j.rv_underdog_desc: Detects today/upcoming matches where money flow ≥50% goes to the underdog with odds ≥3.00.
j.sig_approved_desc: Editor-approved past signals with results. Track accuracy via the historical record.
j.sig_confirmed_desc: Confirms matches entered by big betting syndicates and smart money. Shows volume concentration in Asian handicap and side bets.
j.sig_confirmed_v2_desc: Captures last-minute pro bets with an improved algorithm. Produces fewer but higher-confidence signals.
j.sig_early_desc: Locks in early positions formed right after market open. Lets you catch value before odds drop.
j.sig_fake_desc: Decodes movements that try to mislead bettors with fake volume. Keeps you out of trap odds.
j.sig_underdog_desc: Detects surprise teams backed by unexpected volume surges and odds drops. Surfaces value the market overlooked.
j.toast_match_not_in_db: Match not in database yet. Alarm details are in the card.
j.tut_alarm_band_desc_d: Live alarm band — the latest 10 detected alarms are shown here.
j.tut_alarm_band_desc_m: Live alarm band — new signals stream here.
j.tut_alarms_panel_desc: View and filter all alarm types here. Sort by Sharp, Big Money, Volume Shock and other categories.
j.tut_alarms_short_desc: View and filter all alarm types.
j.tut_amount_col_desc: Total money on the match. Higher-volume matches give more reliable signals.
j.tut_analysis_desc_d: Reach professional analyses here. Pre-match evaluations and market commentary are shared here (PRO members only).
j.tut_analysis_desc_m: Professional match analyses and market commentary (PRO members only).
j.tut_dropping_desc: Track how much odds have dropped in the last 24h.
j.tut_guide_desc: Access our prior experience with market moves here to learn and infer from similar past patterns.
j.tut_market_tabs_desc_d: Switch between Moneyway and Odds pages. View 1X2, 2.5 and BTTS markets.
j.tut_market_tabs_desc_m: Switch between Moneyway and Dropping Odds. The Odds tab shows how much odds dropped in the last 24h.
j.tut_odds_cols_desc: Live betting odds shown here. The donut under each option shows what % of total volume went to that side — track money flow in real time.
j.tut_today_matches_desc: Use this button to filter only today's matches. Click again to remove the filter.

cookies.body:
SmartXFlow may use cookies to improve user experience and analyze system performance.

Cookies are used for:

  • Security
  • Analytics measurement

Users can disable cookies through their browser settings.

disclaimer.body:
SmartXFlow is a data platform that analyzes market data. The analyses, signals and content on the platform do not constitute investment or betting advice.

Users evaluate platform data at their own responsibility. SmartXFlow is not liable for any financial or market decisions made by users.
disclaimer.title: Disclaimer

privacy.body:
SmartXFlow values user privacy.

The platform may collect the following data:

  • Email address
  • License key
  • Usage statistics

This data is used solely for:

  • Account verification
  • License control
  • System security
  • Service improvement

and is not shared with third parties.
privacy.title: Privacy Policy

terms.body:
All users of the SmartXFlow platform are deemed to have accepted the terms below.

SmartXFlow is an analytics platform that analyzes market data and presents data-driven signals to the user. The data, analyses and content provided on the platform do not constitute investment or betting advice.

Users agree to:

  • Use the platform for lawful purposes
  • Protect their account information
  • Not copy platform data without permission

SmartXFlow cannot be held liable for situations arising from updates, changes or technical interruptions to the service.
terms.title: Terms of Use

hero.desc: Reading odds changes and money movements correctly makes a huge difference in match analysis. In this guide you'll learn odds analysis, live odds tracking, money flow interpretation and alarm systems in plain language.

rehber.sump1: SmartXFlow combines all the data above on a single platform, speeding up and simplifying your market analysis process.
rehber.sump2: The platform is an analysis tool; the final decision is always yours. Market data is directional — not a guarantee of outcomes.

rehber_canli.cta_d: Track odds and money-flow changes during matches in real time with SmartXFlow. See critical moves instantly with the alarm system.

hero.desc: Catching critical odds and money-flow changes instantly during a match is the key to making the right decision at the right time. Here you'll learn the importance of live odds tracking, how the alarm system works and how to evaluate matches with dropping odds.

meta.desc: How to do live odds tracking, what is an odds alarm? Learn the meaning of dropping odds matches and live signals with SmartXFlow.
meta.title: Live Odds Tracking, Alarm System & Dropping Odds Matches | SmartXFlow

rehber_canli.s1info_p: When you receive an alarm, instead of acting immediately, first open the relevant match's detail panel and inspect the odds chart and money flow together. Understanding the context is the first step to a correct evaluation.
rehber_canli.s1l1: Sharp odds drop alarm: Triggered when odds drop noticeably in a short time
rehber_canli.s1l2: Heavy money flow alarm: Triggered when an option receives well above normal money
rehber_canli.s1l3: Mismatch alarm: Triggered when odds and money flow point in opposite directions
rehber_canli.s1l4: Live match alarm: Notifies you of critical market changes occurring during a match
rehber_canli.s1p1: SmartXFlow's alarm system automatically detects abnormal market movements and notifies you. You see critical signals instantly without manual tracking.
rehber_canli.s1p2: Alarms appear as scrolling text in the alarm band at the top of the app. Click the "Alarms" button to review all active alarms in detail and see history.
rehber_canli.s2h_li: What you'll see in the Live tab:
rehber_canli.s2l1: Live score and minute info: The match's current state
rehber_canli.s2l2: Live odds changes: How odds move during the match
rehber_canli.s2l3: In-play money flow: Where money is flowing during the match
rehber_canli.s2l4: Period info: Which stage the match is in (first half, second half)
rehber_canli.s2p1: SmartXFlow's "Live" tab shows real-time data of matches currently in progress. You can track in-play odds changes, score updates and live market moves on a single screen.
rehber_canli.s2scp: In a 0-0 match, if the "Over 2.5" odds suddenly drop from 2.40 to 1.90, the market has raised expectations of a goal. If at the same time 60%+ of Moneyway flow goes to "Over 2.5", this can be considered a strong live signal.
rehber_canli.s2t: Why Is Live Odds Tracking Important?
rehber_canli.s2warn_p: Live match data and period info are part of the Pro plan. Core users see live data blurred. Upgrade to Pro for full access.
rehber_canli.s3info_p: When evaluating each match against this guide, also consider the league, time and importance of the match. Top-league signals are usually more reliable, while lower-league moves can be more volatile.
rehber_canli.s3p1: Use the guide below as a reference to interpret data movements in SmartXFlow correctly. This table summarizes common patterns observed in different market conditions.
rehber_canli.s3r1c3: Market is strongly moving toward that outcome
rehber_canli.s3r2c3: Caution — possible line manipulation or balancing
rehber_canli.s3r3c3: The bookmaker may be lowering its margin
rehber_canli.s3r4c3: Lineup news or insider information flow
rehber_canli.s3r5c1: Sudden odds move in live match
rehber_canli.s3r5c3: Effect of a goal, red card or tactical change
rehber_canli.s3r6c3: Very strong directional bias in the market
rehber_canli.s3t: What Do Dropping Odds Matches Mean?

rehber_oran.cta_d: See dropping odds signals instantly with SmartXFlow. Don't miss the market direction.
rehber_oran.cta_t: Track odds movements in real time

hero.desc: Reading changes in betting odds correctly is the most fundamental step to understanding market direction. On this page you'll learn the logic of odds analysis, how to interpret odds changes and the dropping odds concept in plain language.

meta.desc: What is betting odds analysis, how to interpret odds changes? Learn the dropping odds concept and odds movements in plain language.
meta.title: What Is Odds Analysis? How to Interpret Odds Changes? | SmartXFlow

rehber_oran.s1info_p: Odds reflect bookmakers' probability perception; money flow reflects the positions of large players in the market. Reading the two together provides much stronger analysis than odds or stats alone.
rehber_oran.s1p1: Match analysis is a data-driven evaluation process used to predict the likely outcome of a sports match. While traditional analysis examines team form, injuries and past matches, market-based analysis is built on odds movements and money flow in the betting market.
rehber_oran.s1p2: SmartXFlow focuses on the latter: it answers the question "What is the market saying?" with data. By tracking changes in bookmakers' odds and the money entering the market, it captures important signals about a match.
rehber_oran.s1p3: The advantage of market-based analysis is that it reflects information not yet public in the prices. The fact that a key player will not play can show up in odds before it hits the news. SmartXFlow tracks these movements automatically.
rehber_oran.s2p1: Odds analysis is built on watching how odds change over time. These changes are not random; they reflect information flow, risk management and large bets in the market.
rehber_oran.s2p2: Dropping Odds: When the odds of an outcome drop noticeably in a short period, it shows strong market interest in that outcome. SmartXFlow automatically tracks odds drops in 1X2, Over/Under 2.5 and Both Teams to Score markets.
rehber_oran.s2p3: In SmartXFlow, the "Odds 1X2", "Odds 2.5" and "Odds BTTS" tabs list odds changes across all markets in real time. On each match's detail chart you can see how the odds evolved over time.
rehber_oran.s2r1c2: Large players are heavily betting on that outcome
rehber_oran.s2r2c2: Market consensus is forming in that direction
rehber_oran.s2r3c2: Market is moving away from that outcome or news arrived
rehber_oran.s2r4c2: No new information flow in the market
rehber_oran.s2scp: In a Manchester City - Arsenal match, City's win odds drop from 1.85 to 1.62. This drop indicates that the market's confidence in a City win has increased. At the same time Arsenal's odds rise from 4.50 to 5.20 — the market begins to view an away win as less likely.
rehber_oran.s3info_p: SmartXFlow's dropping odds alarm system automatically detects odds drops above your threshold, so you don't have to track every match individually.
rehber_oran.s3l1: Sudden sharp drop: Often the move of large players or insiders. Common before lineup announcements.
rehber_oran.s3l2: Gradual drop: Market consensus is forming slowly. Less urgent but still an important signal.
rehber_oran.s3l3: Multi-directional drop (all 1X2): The bookmaker may be lowering its margin — directional signal weakens.
rehber_oran.s3l4: Last-minute sharp drop: May point to lineup news or insider information flow.
rehber_oran.s3p1: When odds drop in a match, it means the market's confidence in that outcome has grown. But not all drops are equal — speed, size and alignment with money flow all matter.
rehber_oran.s3t: What Happens in Matches with Dropping Odds?

rehber_para.cta_d: Watch Moneyway data and odds movements on a single screen with SmartXFlow. See the market's real direction.
rehber_para.cta_t: Track money flow in real time
rehber_para.d1: Market shows the same direction in both price and money
rehber_para.d2: Odds drop but money doesn't follow — possible manipulation
rehber_para.d3: Money flowing that way while odds rose — could be value
rehber_para.d4: Both odds and money moving away from that outcome

hero.desc: While odds show the market price, money movement reveals the market's real position. On this page you'll learn how to read Moneyway data and how to evaluate odds and money flow together.

meta.desc: How to read money movement in matches and interpret odds together with money flow? Learn Moneyway data and mismatch signals.
meta.title: How to Read Money Movement? Moneyway & Money Flow Analysis | SmartXFlow

rehber_para.s1info_p: If odds are dropping but money flow isn't following, it can be a mismatch signal. The bookmaker may be manipulating the odds to balance risk. Always check money flow to see the real market direction.
rehber_para.s1l1: 55%+ concentration on one side: Shows the market is leaning heavily toward that outcome
rehber_para.s1l2: 40–55% balanced spread: Market is undecided or no clear direction yet
rehber_para.s1l3: Sudden percentage change: Points to a large bet entering and the market changing direction quickly
rehber_para.s1p1: Money movement (Moneyway) shows the percentage distribution of bet amounts across each option in a match. While odds reflect the bookmaker's perception, money flow directly reveals the market's money — i.e. its real positions.
rehber_para.s1p3: In SmartXFlow, the "Moneyway 1X2", "Moneyway 2.5" and "Moneyway BTTS" tabs show money flow data. Each match's detail panel displays percentage distributions and a chart of the flow over time.
rehber_para.s1t: What Is Money Movement in Matches?
rehber_para.s2p1: The strongest signals appear when odds movement and money flow point in the same direction. Reading the two together is the most effective way to understand the market's real tendency.
rehber_para.s2sc_p1: Real Madrid win odds: 2.10 → 1.80 (dropping). At the same time, 58% of Moneyway flow goes to a Real Madrid win. Odds and money are aligned — a strong signal.
rehber_para.s2sc_p2: Counter scenario: odds drop 2.10 → 1.80 but only 35% of Moneyway flow goes to Real Madrid. Despite the odds drop, money isn't following — caution is needed.
rehber_para.s2t: How to Read Odds and Money Together?
rehber_para.s2warn_p: A single signal never guarantees an outcome. Always evaluate multiple data points together. SmartXFlow is an analysis tool, not investment or betting advice.

sta.scraper_alarm_engine_ve_veri_toplama_ser: Real-time status of Scraper, Alarm Engine and data collection services
